Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Freedom at last! What should I do now!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 6 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Take it down a notch, will you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}You bounce back from things so quickly, Junpei-kun.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 0 25 25}Oh hey, Sanada-san's here. Don't see that every day.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}I think he wants to talk about a new candidate.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Does that mean another person is going to join?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 223 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Do you think you can stay after school with me for a mandatory study session? There's like, no one—[cr][n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 223 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Oh, wait. Are you about to head out for the day?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Sorry, I'll see you all back at the dorm later.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}I'm really surprised at how much she's changed.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Adolescence is such a wonderful thing. So full of vibrancy![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}Oh, hello. I just stopped by to pick someone up.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}I might as well introduce you to him now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}He doesn't leave during the break because of his... circumstances.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}It used to only be me and my mom, but she got in an accident. So now it's just me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}Right now, one of his distant relatives is paying for his school expenses.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}But that doesn't mean he should stay at the elementary school dorm all by himself, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}So I decided to move him to your dorm, just for the summer.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}To OUR dorm!? Do you really think that's a good idea?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}Why, of course. He has the potential.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}But as you can see, he's still just an elementary school student. So, it's only a possibility for now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}I've heard a lot about you. You've never lost a boxing match![n]{f 1 1}
